title: Disk space never freed: a logical ref is keeped on a deleted BATs
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test1 (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, data BLOB);
CREATE TABLE test2 (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, info TEXT NOT NULL);
INSERT INTO test1 (id, data) VALUES (1, 'Sample Data 1');
INSERT INTO test2 (id, info) VALUES (1, 'Sample Info 1');
SELECT * FROM test1 WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM test2);
key_bug_features: Logical reference retained after table deletion
